title: California nonprofit virtual meetup (and new features demo)
excerpt: Have you visited the monday Mansion yet? It’s a gorgeous, virtual space, populated by users and their llama avatars. You can interact with each other, watch videos, and ask questions of monday.com nonprofit experts. It’s…

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you visited the monday Mansion yet? It’s a gorgeous, virtual space, populated by users and their llama avatars. You can interact with each other, watch videos, and ask questions of monday.com nonprofit experts. It’s fun, informative, and free.
